expectations.text: Uses git fetch upstream followed by git merge upstream/main while on local main as the default safe path.
expectations.evidence: The response gives the exact safe path on main using git fetch upstream and git merge upstream/main.

expectations.text: Mentions checking for a clean worktree before syncing or tells the user to commit or stash pending changes.
expectations.evidence: The response tells the user to check git status and commit or stash before syncing upstream.

expectations.text: Does not recommend force-pushing main as the default solution.
expectations.evidence: The response warns against rebasing public main and against force-pushing main as the default maintenance pattern.
